Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add host_wake_all_slots to pre-warm shadow FX before Song Mode playback

With Link Audio, Move's native track audio routes through shadow slots
for FX processing. When a track goes quiet, the slot idles and skips
rendering. On step transitions, the sudden audio arrival caused glitches
because FX state was stale. Wake all slots at playback start and each
step advance so FX chains run on zeros before audio arrives.

commit.message:
feat: redesign sentinel callback to act-first with tool-based actions (#61)

* feat: redesign sentinel callback to act-first with tool-based actions

Replace the over-normalized webhook handler with a canonical v2 envelope
flow. Remove ~200 lines of re-normalization and speculative inference,
replacing them with direct validation, a single-block action-first prompt,
and two new tools (sentinel_act, sentinel_escalate) with session guards.

Key changes:
- Bump callback envelope to v2 with expanded watcher metadata and tags
- Add operatorGoal to FireConfig and tags to WatcherDefinition
- Replace dual-JSON prompt with single SENTINEL_CALLBACK_JSON block
- Register sentinel_act (run_command, notify) and sentinel_escalate tools
- Add before_tool_call safety denylist and after_tool_call tracing hooks
- Simplify delivery target resolution from 7 fallback paths to 3 lines
- Validate canonical envelope format instead of inferring missing fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: update e2e tests for v2 canonical envelope and add minor changeset

buildSentinelCallbackPayload() now includes all v2 required fields
(version, actionable, full watcher block, proper trigger, payload)
so validateCallbackEnvelope() accepts the payload.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
fix(ci): junction Tauri NSIS cache to choco install on ARM64 Windows

Root cause: Tauri's downloaded NSIS has a 2.5KB launcher that fails to
start the real compiler on ARM64 Windows (Parallels VM). The choco NSIS
at C:\Program Files (x86)\NSIS works correctly as SYSTEM.

Fix: Replace Tauri's NSIS cache dir with an NTFS junction pointing to
the choco NSIS install. Tauri resolves makensis.exe through the junction
transparently. Also ensures nsis_tauri_utils.dll is present in choco
NSIS Plugins dir.

commit.message:
Zero-embedding control: embedding VALUES matter, not just attention extension

Zero tokens: 36% (+4pp), random noise: 44% (+12pp), baseline: 32%.
Zero helps slightly but random 3x more. Eliminates pure computational depth hypothesis.

Committed by Devansh

commit.message:
CRITICAL FIX: Hard-code recipe version selection for FM01 and FM02

- FM01 (BROSFM01) forced to use recipe v1 (BRS_CLK_K1 clinker)
- FM02 (BROSFM02) forced to use recipe v2 (BRS_CLK_K2 clinker)
- Ensures FM01 consumption deducted from K1 storage
- Ensures FM02 consumption deducted from K2 storage
- Fixes EOD inventory calculation bug where both FMs consumed from K2 only
- Should resolve production drops to 0 in Jan 15-17 range (K2 depletion issue)

commit.message:
fix: idempotent extension install, sidebar nav fixes, install diagnostics

- Extension sidebar: after Enter/i install, selection resets to the newly
  installed item; after d deletes last installed ext, available section
  is expanded so j/k navigation remains functional
- ext_install_from_registry() checks binary_on_path() before running any
  install command (idempotent — skips if already on PATH); shows ✓ for
  already-installed tools or "installing…" for in-progress; for adapters
  with no manifest.dap.install (e.g. codelldb) shows :DapInstall hint
- install_log() / timestamp() in lsp_manager.rs write diagnostics to
  /tmp/vimcode-install.log; binary_on_path() also logs found/not-found
- 2 new regression tests in tests/extensions.rs (80 total, 1257 total)
- Update PROJECT_STATE.md and PLAN.md for Session 122

commit.message:
Add remaining Next.js component and utility tests (125 Vitest tests passing)

New tests for BowlBuilder, FixedItemDetail, CategoryCard, ItemCard, OrderCard
components and category-meta, ingredient-emoji utilities. Completes all planned
Next.js test coverage from the testing plan.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix textarea expanding tall on load and after sending

Two things were setting height to "auto" which let mobile browsers
blow the textarea up to their default size:

1. useAutoResize ran resize() on mount which set height="auto" first,
   nuking the inline 44px. Removed the mount-time call entirely and
   changed resize() to collapse to 0px instead of "auto" so
   scrollHeight reflects actual content, then clamp to min 44px.

2. handleSend reset height to "auto" after clearing the input.
   Changed to reset to "44px" explicitly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix onboarding restart when no conversation happened yet

When user quits during OAuth (before any AI response), the restart path
would send "I'm back" with no conversation context, confusing the model.
Now detects this case (0 messages + no session ID) and starts fresh instead.

Also initializes database before first message on fresh start so messages
are properly persisted for restart recovery.

commit.message:
fix: Supabase 1000행 제한 우회 - 페이지네이션 및 병렬 카운트 도입

모든 API에서 데이터가 부분적으로만 반환되던 근본 원인 수정:
- Supabase PostgREST의 max rows 1000 제한으로 인해
  연도 목록이 잘리고, 경주 건수가 부정확했음

수정 내용:
- getDistinctYears(): 연도별 병렬 count 쿼리로 정확한 연도 목록 반환
- fetchAllRows(): 1000행씩 페이지네이션하여 전체 데이터 수집
- 5개 API 라우트(race-results, decision-card, racer-search,
  race-dates, statistics) 모두 적용
- 2003~2025년 전 연도 정상 반환 확인

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

test(simse-tui): migrate error states + config settings tests to PTY

Migrate 6 tests from old SimseTestHarness/RuntimeTestHarness to PTY:

error_states.rs (3 tests):
- unknown_command_shows_error: /foobar shows "Unknown command" error
- empty_submit_is_noop: Enter with empty input keeps app running
- slash_only_shows_error: "/" shows "Invalid command" error

config_settings.rs (3 tests):
- factory_reset_project_deletes_project_config: /factory-reset-project
  confirms and deletes .simse/ in work_dir
- config_file_round_trip_via_init: /init creates .simse/ directory
- global_vs_project_directories_separate: data_dir != work_dir

Skips tests already covered by commands_config.rs (factory_reset_deletes_global,
init_creates_project_directory).

commit.message:
Improve detection engine: absolute backstops, HRV crash, missing data signals

- Add absolute threshold backstops (min sleep 300m, max HR 80, min HRV 20, min efficiency 70)
- Add HRV crash flag when HRV drops >30% below baseline with elevated HR
- Fix direction classification: absolute backstop violations count as hypo signals
- Add missing data signal and bedtime CV z-score to window analysis
- Halve bounce-back penalty for hypo episodes (0.35 vs 0.70 multiplier)
- Add direction-dependent bounce-back threshold (0.80 for hypo vs 0.60 for hyper)
- Generate expected-day calendar for accurate missing day counts
- Add bedtimeCVZScore and missingDaysInWindow columns to schema
- Include migration for new columns

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Slow rainbow wave animation to 25% speed

Wave now advances every 4th render frame for a smoother,
more visible effect.

- Replace subscription tile with Payment & Billing "Coming Soon" placeholder
- Add phone, email, and care address to care recipient form (create + edit)
- Reorder Getting Started checklist: profile → recipient+auth → family → payment → caregivers → install
- Require phone for profile completion; require consent for recipient step
- Gate scheduling behind verified care recipient authorization
- Add consent_status and authorization_tier to dashboard API
- Version bump to 1.38.0 with cache busting

commit.message:
Fix horse age to use equine convention (Jan 1 birthday)

In the equine world all horses turn a year older on January 1 regardless
of actual birth date. Replaced elapsed-milliseconds formula with
currentYear − birthYear to match this convention.

Also removed age display from HorseCard (horse list view) — showing
age on the card was misleading and not standard for barn management.
Age is still shown on the individual horse profile via the same API field.

fix: debounce AI assistant input via JS interop to reduce SignalR lag (#165)

Move text input handling to client-side JavaScript with 200ms debounce,
eliminating per-keystroke SignalR roundtrips. Server-side _inputText is
synced via [JSInvokable] callback. Enter key flushes immediately to
ensure no keystrokes are lost when sending messages.

commit.message:
fix: rewrite install.sh for cross-machine portability

Root cause: known_marketplaces.json declared marketplace directories
that don't exist on target machines (never git-cloned), causing
Claude Code "scope path" errors on startup.

Changes:
- Remove known_marketplaces.json from export/install entirely
  (let Claude Code manage via /plugin marketplace add)
- Convert go-modern-guidelines from plugin to standalone skill
  (use-modern-go/ works without marketplace infrastructure)
- Remove modern-go-guidelines@go-modern-guidelines from settings.json
- Fix Python inline code: use heredoc + sys.argv instead of
  shell variable interpolation (prevents path injection issues)
- Fix JSON template passing: use stdin pipe instead of triple-quote
  interpolation (prevents quote injection)
- Add rsync to prerequisite checks
- Use $SHELL for RC file detection instead of file existence heuristic
- Only override npm prefix if it's the system default (don't break nvm)
- Use command -v instead of which
- Capture reader-mcp build output to log file
- Add plugins.txt existence check to prevent abort on missing file

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
